title: Bump Storage to v1.61.1
body:
As we don't have release branches yet, and the changes look to all be typo fixes and updates of vendoring that we want, I've created this out of main.  If I should rethink, please let me know.

Addresses: #458

At least once merged and tagged.

<!--- Please read the [contributing guidelines](https://github.com/containers/container-libs/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md) before proceeding --->

comments.body:
And yes there a way more dependency updates than needed. Does it matter, likely not but to me a patch release should be limited to the minimum amount of patches that actually fix things not other unrelated things.

FWIW I did downgrade filepath-securejoin in https://github.com/opencontainers/selinux/releases/tag/v1.13.1 so I am not sure we longer need a storage bump at all for this as the end applications can update to that.
We'll move forward with this after a new branch is created, and if it is still required with the securejoin updates that @Luap99 has done.
